ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is recorded */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "capital_mobility" INTEGER /* Indicator of capital mobility (0 or 1) */,
  "trade_balance" REAL /* Trade balance */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) for the specific year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Central bank's interest rate */,
  "debt_to_gdp_ratio" REAL /* Debt to GDP ratio */,
  "fiscal_balance" REAL /* Government's fiscal balance */,
  "hdi" REAL /* Human Development Index (HDI) */,
  "fdi" REAL /* Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the economic indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device type (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the browser or application used */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)
